title: cleisostoma rugosulum
intro: Cleisostoma rugosulum, also known as the Rough-leaved Cleisostoma, is a type of orchid native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma rugosulum include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or dried extracts, and is typically consumed as a tea or added to traditional medicine formulas.
